queries.question: Provide a list of all photo descriptions and also illustration descriptions but only related to the history course.
queries.sql:
SELECT Photos.description
FROM Subjects JOIN Photos ON Subjects.ID = Photos.SubjectID
UNION
SELECT Illustrations.description
FROM Subjects JOIN Illustrations ON Subjects.ID = Illustrations.SubjectID
WHERE Subjects.Name = "History"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/education#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/education/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?o0 WHERE {
  {
    ?subjects a :Subjects .
    ?photos a :Photos .
    ?photos p:hasSubjects ?subjects .
    ?photos p:Description ?description .
    BIND(?description AS ?o0)
  }
  UNION
  {
    ?subjects a :Subjects .
    ?illustrations a :Illustrations .
    ?illustrations p:hasSubjects ?subjects .
    ?illustrations p:Description ?description .
    ?subjects p:name ?name_f .
    FILTER(STR(?name_f) = "History")
    BIND(?description AS ?o0)
  }
}

queries.question: What are the descriptions of photos related to the history course and what are the descriptions of illustrations related to the same course?
queries.sql:
SELECT Photos.description
FROM Subjects JOIN Photos ON Subjects.ID = Photos.SubjectID
WHERE Subjects.Name = "History"
UNION
SELECT Illustrations.description
FROM Subjects JOIN Illustrations ON Subjects.ID = Illustrations.SubjectID
WHERE Subjects.Name = "History"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/education#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/education/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?o0 WHERE {
  {
    ?subjects a :Subjects .
    ?photos a :Photos .
    ?photos p:hasSubjects ?subjects .
    ?photos p:Description ?description .
    ?subjects p:name ?name_f .
    FILTER(STR(?name_f) = "History")
    BIND(?description AS ?o0)
  }
  UNION
  {
    ?subjects a :Subjects .
    ?illustrations a :Illustrations .
    ?illustrations p:hasSubjects ?subjects .
    ?illustrations p:Description ?description .
    ?subjects p:name ?name_f .
    FILTER(STR(?name_f) = "History")
    BIND(?description AS ?o0)
  }
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Show descriptions of all photos and illustrations related to the history course.
